formula_note: Direct carry-through of the retained 9,000-11,000 campaign-wide civilian range.
uncertainty_note: Range is summary-level and actor attribution is incomplete.
quality_note: Useful total campaign civilian range, but not side-specific.

inflicting_side: US-led coalition and/or Iraqi government forces
formula_note: Applied the retained one-third floor-share to the retained 9,000 / 10,000 / 11,000 total range.
uncertainty_note: This combined category does not separate coalition from Iraqi forces and should be read as a floor-like approximation.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the coalition-admitted minimum.
uncertainty_note: Admitted subset only; almost certainly below the full coalition-caused total.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the Airwars likely coalition-caused civilian range.
uncertainty_note: Campaign-wide estimate from a monitor source; not directly comparable to the coalition's admitted minimum.
quality_note: Most informative retained coalition-specific civilian estimate for the campaign.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the UN/ISIS execution-style killing minimum summarized by Airwars.
uncertainty_note: Specific to execution-style killings and therefore a lower-bound subset of ISIS-caused civilian harm.

formula_note: Direct carry-through of the al-Jadida strike report.
uncertainty_note: Specific event only; should not be mistaken for the full west-phase civilian death total.
quality_note: Strong side-attributed event inside the west-phase row.
